title: Agent Semantic Client Cache Manifest
description: agent semantic client local SQLite cache generation manifest derived from native-provider packets or native index exports.

requestFingerprint.description: Stable fingerprint of the normalized agent request that produced a replay-sensitive client-captured artifact. prompt-output/*.txt artifacts are only eligible for direct stdout replay when this fingerprint matches the current request.

fileHashes.description: Source freshness hashes for replay eligibility. Entries store only project-relative path plus sha256 and may be supplied by a validated provider packet or derived by the client from validated syntax locator fields.

artifactIds.description: Provider-owned artifact ids or client-captured prompt-output write-back ids relative to $PRJ_CACHE_HOME/agent-semantic-protocol/artifacts. prompt-output/*.txt artifacts are eligible for direct prompt stdout replay only when requestFingerprint matches the current request. search/*.json semantic-search-packet artifacts are eligible for replay through the shared compact graph renderer. query/*.json semantic-query-packet artifacts are eligible for query/owner-items compact query replay. semantic-tree-sitter-query/*.json artifacts, or query/*.json artifacts with artifactKind=semantic-tree-sitter-query, are eligible for exact syntax-query artifact replay and normalized row replay when catalog/profile fingerprints match. Other ids remain provenance for provider packets or rendered cache artifacts.
